mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS confirmed_reservations, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN r.total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gross_sales, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS refund_count FROM performance p LEFT JOIN schedule sc ON sc.performance_id = p.performance_id LEFT JOIN reservation r ON r.schedule_id = sc.schedule_id WHERE p.promoter_id = #{promoterId}

SELECT p.performance_id, p.title AS performance_title, p.venue_name, p.approval_status, p.status, COUNT(DISTINCT sc.schedule_id) AS schedule_count, COALESCE(MIN(sc.show_date), p.start_date) AS first_show_date, COALESCE(MAX(sc.show_date), p.end_date) AS last_show_date, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS confirmed_reservations, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cancelled_reservations, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN r.total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gross_sales, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN r.total_amount ELSE 0 END) * 0.9), 0) AS settlement_amount FROM performance p LEFT JOIN schedule sc ON sc.performance_id = p.performance_id LEFT JOIN reservation r ON r.schedule_id = sc.schedule_id WHERE p.promoter_id = #{promoterId} GROUP BY p.performance_id, p.title, p.venue_name, p.approval_status, p.status, p.start_date, p.end_date ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.reservation_no, r.status, r.seat_count, r.total_amount, m.name AS member_name, m.phone AS member_phone, p.title AS performance_title, sc.show_date, sc.show_time, el.checked_in_at, GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT(s.section, '-', s.seat_row, s.seat_number) ORDER BY s.section, s.seat_row, s.seat_number SEPARATOR ', ' ) AS seat_summary FROM reservation r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id JOIN schedule sc ON r.schedule_id = sc.schedule_id JOIN performance p ON sc.performance_id = p.performance_id LEFT JOIN entrance_log el ON el.reservation_id = r.reservation_id LEFT JOIN reservation_seat rs ON rs.reservation_id = r.reservation_id LEFT JOIN seat s ON s.seat_id = rs.seat_id WHERE p.venue_id = #{venueId} AND r.status = 'CONFIRMED'
AND DATE_FORMAT(sc.show_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{showDate}
AND ( r.reservation_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY r.reservation_id, r.reservation_no, r.status, r.seat_count, r.total_amount, m.name, m.phone, p.title, sc.show_date, sc.show_time, el.checked_in_at ORDER BY sc.show_date, sc.show_time, r.created_at DESC
